subcodes.first_line: O true servant of God, render thanks unto the Lord that the dark chamber of thy heart hath been illumined by the kindling of the lamp of guidance, and thy brow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق شکر کن خدا را که شبستان قلب بایقاد سراج هدی منور گشت و جبین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
